name: Stundenglass Modul Vaporizer | 6000mAh
summary: A 6000mAh vaporiser attachment that turns a Stündenglass water pipe into a temperature-controlled vaporiser.
description: The Stündenglass Modül is a battery-powered vaporiser attachment that pairs with the Stündenglass or Kompact water pipe to vaporise dried herb or concentrate through water. A quartz heating chamber, dial control and full-colour screen give precise temperature and session control, and the 6000mAh battery manages up to 50 sessions per charge with pass-through use. It suits patients who already own a Stündenglass pipe and want to add proper temperature-controlled vapour. It needs that compatible water pipe to work, so it is an upgrade to an existing setup rather than a complete device on its own.
